items.author: @KobeissiLetter
items.content: Widespread reports about a potential '45-day ceasefire' in the Iran War over the last 12 hours. US White House official: 45-day ceasefire is just 'one of many ideas' being discussed.

items.author: @pumpkin_oranges
items.content: Iran can funnel billions and billions of dollars back to the USA EVERY YEAR to fund overspending. Trump had a deal to get ME countries to spend those billions in USA but not likely after invading Iran.

items.author: @ClancyReports
items.content: Watching the Trump countdown to join Israel in sweeping war crimes by bombing more civilian targets in Iran. He is not a negotiator or deal maker. He is acting like bully. His partner in crime doesn't want any deal at all.

items.author: @Moses1150599
items.content: Russia's greatest threat is China and because of the war, Russia is dependent on them. Trump is also saving Russia from China, probably for a deal.

items.author: @debraak
items.content: Iran will never trust a deal nor make a deal with Netanyahu and Trump.

items.author: @_deepvalue_
items.content: Markets are sitting on edge tonight as Trump's self-imposed deadline for Iran comes due. Oil climbed again Tuesday as the diplomatic window looks increasingly narrow. Trump: military action is on the table if Tehran refuses to engage on nuclear deal.

items.author: @TheStarKenya
items.content: Trump threatens to take out Iran 'in one night' if it fails to make a deal before the deadline he set for Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global energy route.

items.author: @setusavla
items.content: Trump Says Last thing US wants to do is rebuild power plants. Iran's decimation by midnight Tuesday if no deal. US wants Greenland, they don't want to give it to us.

items.author: @HOTELIERCRYPTO_
items.content: DONALD TRUMP EXTENDED HIS DEADLINE FOR IRAN TO TUESDAY 8 P.M. ET, WARNING OF STRIKES ON CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE IF NO DEAL IS REACHED. Crude prices hold near $110-$112 per barrel.

items.author: @ZFTWARNING
items.content: Trump threatens new rampage as Iran deal deadline nears - The Washington Post

items.author: @BK4HOF
items.content: Iran bombs Iranian delegate or attacks oil fields during a ceasefire. Trump has been tricked, used, and now frustrated. His Easter post on Truth Social.

items.author: @grahambanks01
items.content: Trump in fix as Iran rejects ceasefire offer amidst threats to power plants. Iran turned down a US-backed ceasefire, demanding nothing less than a definitive peace agreement.

items.author: @cryptolevier
items.content: Watching $BTC rally past $70K on Iran ceasefire vibes — institutions like Strategy still holding strong!

items.author: @_Johnny_Alpha_
items.content: Iran have already said 'no' and the US wouldn't be prepared to pay the reparations required. Iran would be stupid to trust the US ceasefire.

items.author: @KobeissiLetter
items.content: Oil prices are now crossing above $115/barrel in the US. If current levels sustained ~7 weeks, US CPI inflation will rise to ~3.7%. Highest level since September 2023.

items.author: @WatcherGuru
items.content: Netflix $NFLX ordered to reimburse Italian subscribers after court rules price hikes were illegal.
